Subject: Global Justice: Take Action on Iran Human Rights Crisis
Body:
Dear {{RepresentativeFullName}},

As a constituent residing in {{RidingOrRegion}} ({{PostalCode}}), I am writing to draw your attention to one of the most pressing human rights crises of our time: the Iranian regime's systematic brutalization of its own population. Mass executions, widespread torture, the killing of peaceful protesters, and information warfare through internet blackouts constitute crimes that demand immediate international response.

The extraordinary mobilization of 350,000 people in Toronto—one of the largest demonstrations by the Iranian diaspora anywhere—signals the depth of concern within our community and the expectation that Canada's elected officials will respond with meaningful action. Your stance on this critical issue will influence how Iranian-Canadian voters evaluate representation in upcoming elections.

The Green Party's foundational commitment to peace, global justice, and human rights makes this a natural fit for your advocacy. I urge you to use your voice in {{RidingOrRegion}} and Parliament to push for the following essential actions:

1. Stand in solidarity with Iran's freedom movement
Make public statements affirming Canada's support for the Iranian people's struggle for democracy and human rights.

2. Condemn the regime's campaign of terror
Speak clearly against the IRGC's orchestration of mass violence and the regime's systematic repression.

3. Address security threats within Canada
Advocate for thorough investigation and appropriate legal measures against IRGC operatives and regime officials present in Canadian territory.

4. Dismantle the regime's financial infrastructure
Support comprehensive efforts to identify and seize regime-linked assets, ensuring these resources support humanitarian relief and democratic opposition initiatives.

5. Protect digital freedoms
Champion technological solutions and international cooperation that enable Iranians to access uncensored information despite regime restrictions.

6. Secure the release of political detainees
Collaborate with international partners to press for the immediate release of all political prisoners held by the Iranian regime.

7. Support democratic transition planning
Encourage Canadian government engagement with legitimate democratic opposition leader, Prince Reza Pahlavi, and support extending a parliamentary invitation for Prince Pahlavi to speak about Iran's path toward secular democracy.

Global peace and justice require more than principles—they demand action. I trust you will bring the urgency this situation warrants to your work in Parliament.

Thank you for your commitment to human rights.

Sincerely,
{{UserName}}
{{PhoneNumber}}
